reviews.comment:
La atención de diez.. solo paramos a comprar unas cosas y al baño.. el baño maso, estaba todo el piso con mucha agua.

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent... we only stopped to buy a few things and use the bathroom... the bathroom was so-so, the whole floor was covered in water.

reviews.comment:
Esta en pleno centro cuenta con lugar para sentarse y tomas algo y baños abiertos para todos fundamental!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's right in the city center, has a place to sit and grab a drink, and the restrooms are open to everyone—essential!

reviews.comment:
Destacó lo grande y limpio de los baños y la amabilidad de la señora a cargo de ese sector. Por otro lado, No ofrecían comidas calientes, Shop muy chico.

(Translated by Google)
He emphasized the large and clean bathrooms and the friendliness of the lady in charge of that area. On the other hand, they didn't offer hot meals, and the shop was very small.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM09LMnZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
En el bar, solo una chica atendiendo a full a muchas personas (las mesas y quiénes entraban) 15' esperando en la fila por una ficha para el agua caliente , y eso que estaba primera.
Más allá de eso los baños estaban limpios y el lugar de veía ordenado.

(Translated by Google)
At the bar, there was only one girl working hard serving a lot of people (both the tables and those coming in). I waited 15 minutes in line for a token for the hot water, and I was first in line.
Otherwise, the bathrooms were clean and the place seemed tidy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtc01mSmxBRRAB
